# Unicorns R Us Is Bullshit

> A detailed, evidence-based rebuttal of the Unicorns-R-Us website and how it gets weaponized against polyamorous couples, triads, and unicorns in online communities.

This site critically examines the claims made by unicorns-r-us.com, a widely-cited resource in polyamorous communities that warns against "unicorn hunting." While acknowledging that harmful patterns exist, it argues the site relies on unsupported claims, loaded definitions, and a tone designed to shame rather than educate. The core position: relationship ethics depend on how people treat each other, not on relationship structure.

## Pages

- [Home](https://unicorns-r-us-is-bullshit.com/): The full rebuttal — examines each major claim, provides counter-evidence, and reframes the conversation around behavior rather than structure
- [The Poly Police](https://unicorns-r-us-is-bullshit.com/poly-police): When someone polices your polyamorous relationship with "just asking questions" — a guide for both sides of the conversation

## Related

- [Poly Convergence](https://polyconvergence.com/): Sister site with comprehensive polyamory resources, wiki, and community stories
